name: yoink
description: Use any GitHub repository as RAG context for Copilot — query codebases, docs, and institutional knowledge without leaving VS Code.

commands.title: Yoink: Set Azure OpenAI API Key

enumDescriptions: Azure OpenAI deployment (requires API key, endpoint, and deployment name)
Local OpenAI-compatible server such as Ollama (no API key required)
yoink.embedding.provider.description: Embedding provider to use for indexing.

yoink.embedding.openai.baseUrl.description: Base URL for OpenAI-compatible API (for proxies or compatible services).

yoink.embedding.azure.endpoint.description: Azure OpenAI resource endpoint URL, e.g. https://myresource.openai.azure.com

yoink.embedding.azure.deploymentName.description: Azure OpenAI deployment name for the embedding model.

yoink.embedding.azure.dimensions.description: Embedding vector dimensions for the Azure OpenAI deployment. Must match the deployed model (e.g. 1536 for text-embedding-3-small, 3072 for text-embedding-3-large).

yoink.embedding.local.baseUrl.description: Base URL of the local OpenAI-compatible embedding server (e.g. Ollama).

yoink.embedding.local.model.description: Model name to request from the local embedding server, e.g. nomic-embed-text.

yoink.embedding.local.dimensions.description: Embedding vector dimensions produced by the local model. Must match the actual model output (e.g. 768 for nomic-embed-text).

yoink.search.topK.description: Number of chunks to return per tool query.

yoink.sync.onStartup.description: Automatically sync data sources marked 'onStartup' when VS Code launches.

languageModelTools.name: yoink-search
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search your indexed GitHub repositories for relevant code, documentation, or knowledge.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search indexed GitHub repositories using vector similarity. Returns relevant code snippets and documentation. Use 'repository' to filter by a specific repo (owner/repo format), or 'tool' to use a configured tool scope. Call yoink-list first to discover available repositories and tools.

query.description: Natural language search query describing what you're looking for.

repository.description: Optional: filter to a specific indexed repository in 'owner/repo' format (e.g. 'vercel/next.js'). Omit to search all indexed repositories.

tool.description: Optional: use a configured Yoink tool name to search only its assigned repositories. Get available tool names from yoink-list.

languageModelTools.name: yoink-list
languageModelTools.userDescription: List all indexed GitHub repositories and configured search tools in Yoink.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all data sources (GitHub repositories) and tools currently indexed and available in Yoink. Call this first to discover what repositories are available before searching. Returns repository names, branches, status, file/chunk counts, and any configured tool scopes.

languageModelTools.name: yoink-get-file
languageModelTools.userDescription: Fetch the full content of a file from an indexed GitHub repository.
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetch the full or partial content of a file from an indexed GitHub repository. Use this when search results reference a file and you need more context than the returned chunk provides. Provide startLine and endLine to fetch a specific section of a large file.

repository.description: The indexed repository in 'owner/repo' format (e.g. 'vercel/next.js'). Use the repository shown in search results.

filePath.description: Path to the file within the repository, as shown in search results.

startLine.description: Optional. First line to return (1-indexed). Use line numbers from search results.

endLine.description: Optional. Last line to return (1-indexed). Use line numbers from search results.
